name: Peppermint Pinwheels
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons skim milk, at room temperature
1/2 teaspoon red or green food coloring
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Uncover the prepared baking sheet; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, egg white, milk, vanilla, and peppermint extract.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking soda, and salt.
5. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened.
6. Divide dough into halves.
7. Stir 1/2 teaspoon food coloring into one half of the dough.
8. Shape dough between two pieces of waxed paper; roll each portion into a 12 x 11-inch rectangle.
9. Remove top sheets of waxed paper from the plain dough and colored doughs.
10. Invert the plain dough on top of the colored dough.
11. Peel off the top sheet of paper.
12. From the long side, roll up in jelly roll style, removing the bottom sheet of paper as you roll.
13. Cut crisscross into halves.
14. Wrap and chill for 4 to 24 hours.
15. Cut rolls into 1/8-inch slices.
16. Place 2 inches apart on the prepared cookie sheet.
17. Bake 8 to 10 minutes.
